response.justification: Candidate brings 13+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js at re:cinq including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — a direct match for the AI agent development requirement. Strong fundamentals in testing (TDD advocate, workshop instructor), DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD), and multiple languages. Gaps exist around Nest.js, React depth, Kotlin/Java recency, and cloud platform breadth (AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure), but the trajectory and craftsmanship signal make this a clear interview.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack with recent TS/Node.js and AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq
Strong testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops)
Polyglot experience: TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang, plus Docker/Kubernetes
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in primary stack
React mentioned briefly; depth and Vitest experience unclear
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP experience at re:cinq
TypeScript/Node.js full-stack depth with testing focus
Missing Nest.js and limited recent React/Kotlin signal
